it.title: Concorso aneddotico con il presidente della Repubblica francese (avete letto bene)

en.title: Anecdote contest feat French Republic's President ( You read that right )

LвҖҷarmГ©e israГ©lienne et des groupes palestiniens communiquent abondamment sur leur puissance de feu. QuвҖҷen est-il vraiment ? В« Le Monde В» a identifiГ© une partie des roquettes et des missiles actuellement utilisГ©s, grГўce aux vidГ©os tournГ©es sur place.

#EnquГӘteVidГ©oвҖӢ

Par centaines, des missiles et des roquettes ont percГ© le ciel dвҖҷIsraГ«l et de lвҖҷenclave palestinienne de Gaza, entre le 10 mai 2021 et lвҖҷannonce dвҖҷun cessez-le-feu, dix jours plus tard.

Sur les rГ©seaux sociaux, lвҖҷarmГ©e israГ©lienne et des groupes palestiniens louent leur puissance de feu, leur matГ©riel et leur capacitГ© de dГ©fense. Quelles armes sont utilisГ©es par Tsahal, le Hamas et le Djihad Islamique Palestinien ? Comment fonctionne le В« DГҙme de fer В» israГ©lien et comment les groupes armГ©s palestiniens tentent-ils de le contourner ?

AuthentifiГ©es et analysГ©es par В« Le Monde В», des vidГ©os capturГ©es sur place et des documents de propagande Г©clairent les tactiques des combattants et renseignent sur leur Г©quipement. Ils mettent en lumiГЁre un matГ©riel plus puissant que jamais mais des arsenaux encore trГЁs dГ©sГ©quilibrГ©s.

рҹ”ҙ Vous souhaitez nous contacter ? Nous envoyer des infos ou des documents confidentiels ?
Voici notre adresse : investigation@lemonde.fr

snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

snippet.title: Vaccin or not vaccin ? Si tu hГ©sites, regarde Г§a
snippet.description:
Les vaccins Covid sont-il sГ»rs ? Que valent les vaccins Г  ARN messager Pfizer et Moderna ? Quels sont les effets secondaires ? Les vaccins sont-ils efficaces contre les variants ? Permettent-ils de couper la circulation du virus ? Est-il plus ou moins risquГ© de choper le covid ou de se vacciner, notamment quand on est jeune et en bonne santГ© ? On rГ©pond Г  toutes ces questions et Г  bien d'autres dans cette vidГ©o.

Pour nous soutenir, dГ©couvrir + de 50 vidГ©os exclusives et recevoir 2 nouvelles vidГ©os chaque mois sur les sujets clГ©s pour comprendre le monde, Г§a se passe sur notre site :
https://www.osonscomprendre.com


SOURCES :

рҹҚ” QuвҖҷy a-t-il dans les vaccins ARN ? 
Pfizer : https://www.comirnatyeducation.fr/files/Approved_PIL.pdf 
Moderna : https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/covid-19-vaccine-moderna-epar-product-information_fr.pdf#page=9 

рҹ§¬ Comment fonctionnent les vaccins ARN ? 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=advGuEGrl8g 
https://youtu.be/-spBg20oXWU 

рҹҡ‘ Les risques Covid par Гўge :
Etude massive et prГ©cise sur la premiГЁre vague franГ§aise : 
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2666991920000329?via%3Dihub 

LвҖҷamГ©lioration du soin a baissГ© la probabilitГ© dвҖҷaller en rГ©a de 59 % et celle de mourir du Covid de 56 % en France juste dans les 4 premiers mois de l'Г©pidГ©mie :
https://hal.archives-ouvertes.fr/hal-02946545 

рҹӨ’ Covid Longs : 
60 % des patients hospitalisГ©s ont encore des symptomes aprГЁs 6 mois : https://www.clinicalmicrobiologyandinfection.com/article/S1198-743X(21)00147-6/fulltext  

Covid long mГӘme chez patients jeunes sans comorbiditГ©s : 
https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.03.12.21253448v1.full 

рҹ’ү Les risques des vaccins. 
Chocs allergiques anaphylactiques :
1 / 90 000 pour Pfizer : 
https://www.cdc.gov/mmwr/volumes/70/wr/mm7002e1.htm#T1_down 
1 / 400 000 pour Moderna : 
https://www.cdc.gov/mmwr/volumes/70/wr/mm7004e1.htm 

71 % de ces chocs ont lieux dans les 15 minutes suivant le vaccin     (85 % dans les 30 minutes) : 
https://www.cdc.gov/mmwr/volumes/70/wr/mm7002e1.htm 

Les possibles et rarissimes inflammations du myocardes ou du pancrГ©as : 
https://ansm.sante.fr/uploads/2021/05/07/20210506-rapport-comirnaty-14-vfa.pdf 

рҹ•— Les effets Г  long terme ? 
Les effets secondaires des vaccins se dГ©clarent dans les 6 semaines : 
https://www.uwa.edu.au/news/article/2021/march/how-we-know-the-covid-vaccine-wont-have-long-term-side-effects 
https://www.chop.edu/news/long-term-side-effects-covid-19-vaccine 

рҹ’Ә LвҖҷefficacitГ© des vaccins ARN
Contaminations diminuГ©es de 95 % / Formes symptomatiques, graves ou non, diminuГ©es de 97 % :
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33964222/ 

95 % dвҖҷefficacitГ© sur le variant anglais (p.15) : 
https://www.has-sante.fr/upload/docs/application/pdf/2021-04/strategie_vaccinale_contre_la_covid-19___impact_potentiel_de_la_circulation_des_variants_du_sars-cov-2_sur_la_strategie_synt.pdf 

рҹҮҝрҹҮҰ Le variant sud-africain : 
Pfizer au Qatar : 75 % de contaminations en moins / 97.4 % de formes graves en moins :
https://www.nejm.org/doi/10.1056/NEJMc2104974 

рҹҮ®рҹҮі Le variant indien : 
Des вҖңpreuves prometteusesвҖқ dвҖҷefficacitГ© contre le variant indien : 
https://www.ft.com/content/a70d423a-7d7c-4736-8828-0a485d7c3a8e 

вһ•5пёҸвғЈ5пёҸвғЈ : Et lвҖҷAstraZeneca ? 
Risques de thromboses graves : https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/chmp-annex/annex-vaxzevria-art53-visual-risk-contextualisation_en.pdf 

Efficace Г  84 % contre la souche originelle, Г  75 % contre le variant anglais, Г  10 % contre le sud-africain (p.15) : 
https://www.has-sante.fr/upload/docs/application/pdf/2021-04/strategie_vaccinale_contre_la_covid-19___impact_potentiel_de_la_circulation_des_variants_du_sars-cov-2_sur_la_strategie_synt.pdf 

рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ Les bГ©nГ©fices collectifs de la vaccination : 
Si malgrГ© un vaccin, tu es infectГ© par le Covid, tu as deux fois moins de chance de transmettre la maladie : 
https://www.gov.uk/government/news/one-dose-of-covid-19-vaccine-can-cut-household-transmission-by-up-to-half

fr.description:

snippet.title: SPEEDRUN (Minecraft Animation)
snippet.description:
A beginner speedrunner, Mont has entered a competition to battle against a group of runners to fight for the winning title. But when Dream, a renowned runner enters, it is a heated race to be the first to reach the end and defeat the Ender Dragon. But as runners start to interfere with each others paths, they will be faced with difficult choices to beat Minecraft. Who will survive or be hunted? Who will win?

snippet.title: Lil Nas X - SUN GOES DOWN (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for вҖңSUN GOES DOWNвҖқ by Lil Nas X
 
Listen & Download вҖңSUN GOES DOWNвҖқ out now: https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown

Directed by Lil Nas X & Psycho Films
Written by Lil Nas X
Creative Director/Stylist: Hodo Musa
EP: Sam Canter & Jack Begert
Producer/Commissioner: Saul Levitz
Producer: Geenah Krisht
Production Company: Psycho Films
DP: David Bolen
Editor: Neal Farmer & Jack Begert
VFX: BUF
Addtl. VFX: Justin Johnson & Neal Farmer
Color: Paul Yacono
Brand Integration Experts: Jennifer Frommer, Hannah Satzke

I wanna run away
DonвҖҷt wanna lie, I donвҖҷt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвҖҷll see the sun 

IвҖҷd rather run away
DonвҖҷt wanna lie, I donвҖҷt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвҖҷll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But itвҖҷs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who threw dirt on your name 

Since ten, I been feeling lonely
Had friends but they was picking on me
Always thinking why my lips so big?
Was I too dark? Can they sense my fears?

These gay thoughts would always haunt me
I prayed God would take it from me
ItвҖҷs hard for you when youвҖҷre fighting
And nobody knows it when youвҖҷre silent 

IвҖҷd be by the phone
Stanning Nicki morning into dawn
Only place I felt like I belonged
Strangers make you feel so loved, you know? 

And IвҖҷm happy by the way
That I made that jump, that leap of faith
IвҖҷm happy that it all worked out for me
Imma make my fans so proud of me, (ohhhh)

I wanna run away
DonвҖҷt wanna lie, I donвҖҷt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвҖҷll see the sun 

IвҖҷd rather run away
DonвҖҷt wanna lie, I donвҖҷt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвҖҷll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But itвҖҷs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who throw dirt on your name 

oooohhh
hoooahh
unooooh

ГҮa peut ГӘtre une maison, une partie de forteresse, ou mГӘme une pyramide !

ГҮa peut rendre le jeu Г  la fois plus facile et plus compliquГ©.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nets 104, Celtics 93
snippet.description: Led by Kevin DurantвҖҷs 32 points and 12 rebounds, the Nets defeated the Celtics, 104-93, in Game 1. Kyrie Irving (29 points, six rebounds) and James Harden (21 points, nine rebounds, eight assists) added a combined 50 points for the Nets in the victory, while Jayson Tatum tallied a team-high 22 points for the Celtics. Additionally for the Celtics, Robert Williams III recorded 11 points, nine rebounds and a Celtics Playoff record nine blocks in the losing effort. The Nets lead this best-of-seven series, 1-0, with Game 2 taking place on Tuesday, May 25 at 7:30 p.m. ET.

Au programme 4 Г©quipes et 8 participants qui vont Г  tour de rГҙle essayer d'imiter l'attaquant du rГ©al Madrid et plus prГ©cisГ©ment ses dribbles face Г  l'AtlГ©tico Madrid en 2017 ! 

ГҖ titre personnel je suis trГЁs content de cette vidГ©o, j'espГЁre qu'elle vous plaira autant qu'Г  moi-mГӘme. 

Et toi qu'est ce qui te rend le plus heureux ? Le retour de Karim en sГ©lection ou la sortie de cette vidГ©o ?

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UKвҖҷs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-MвҖҷs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, вҖҳSpeak Your MindвҖҷ which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UKвҖҷs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Grizzlies 117, Warriors 112
snippet.description:
Ja Morant recorded 35 points (15 in the 4th quarter + OT), along with 6 rebounds, 6 assists and 4 steals for the Grizzlies as they defeated the Warriors, 117-112, in overtime. Stephen Curry led the Warriors with 39 points (6-15 3pt FG), while Draymond Green tallied a triple-double with 11 points, 16 rebounds and 10 assists in the losing effort. 
With tonightвҖҷs victory, the Grizzlies have secured the No. 8 seed in the Western Conference and will face the Utah Jazz in the first round of the 2021 NBA Playoffs

snippet.title: 38 SECRETS sur SHINGEKI NO KYOJIN вҡ”пёҸ
snippet.description:
Merci Г  Lords Mobile pour le soutien ! Pour avoir une chance de gagner l'une des deux collections d'SNK c'est ici: http://igg.com/event/mangatrash

LвҖҷauteur de lвҖҷattaque des titans est sans conteste un grand mangaka ! 
Vous avez pu vous en rendre compte dans notre vidГ©o sur les foreshadowing. Mais voilГ , ce ne sont pas les seuls secrets que cache son Е“uvre, jвҖҷen ai encore beaucoup Г  vous faire dГ©couvrir :
Rien quвҖҷun exemple avec lвҖҷamour dвҖҷHajime Isayama pour les chiffres !
Vous le savez, il n'y a quвҖҷune seule page numГ©rotГ©e dans tout le manga, la page 13 du chapitre 1. Soit l'espГ©rance de vie dвҖҷun porteur de titans, la malГ©diction dвҖҷymir. Ce chiffre on le retrouve aussi dans ce qui sera le dernier chapitre de la sГ©rie : le 139
13 ans, 9 titans. LвҖҷattaque des titans aura durГ© вҖҰ pendant 13 annГ©es ! (2009 - 2021)
Croyez moi, cette info nвҖҷest quвҖҷune mise en bouche !

в–јв–ј DГүROULE LA DESCRIPTION в–јв–ј

snippet.description:

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, itвҖҷs me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I donвҖҷt hold no grudges, promise this ainвҖҷt a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donвҖҷt
Maybe weвҖҷll fix this or maybe we wonвҖҷt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainвҖҷt a heartbreak anthem, I donвҖҷt care what happened but I ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it 
DonвҖҷt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it 
And I donвҖҷt wanna feel, I donвҖҷt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainвҖҷt a heartbreak anthem, I donвҖҷt care what happened, but I ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, itвҖҷs me your ex (again)
I didnвҖҷt want to call but thereвҖҷs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you IвҖҷm wearing out this bulletproof vest but IвҖҷll be ok, IвҖҷm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donвҖҷt
Maybe weвҖҷll fix this or maybe we wonвҖҷt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainвҖҷt a heartbreak anthem, I donвҖҷt care what happened but I ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it 
DonвҖҷt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it 
And I donвҖҷt wanna feel, I donвҖҷt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainвҖҷt a heartbreak anthem, I donвҖҷt care what happened, but I ainвҖҷt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: Dream - Mask (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Dream - Mask (Official Lyric Video)
Stream Mask:  https://dream.lsnto.me/Mask

Follow Dream: 
Instagram: @DreamвҖӢWasTaken
Twitter: @Dream

Produced by:

Perish: 
Twitter: @perishbeats
Instagram: @perishbeats

BanRisk:
Twitter: @prodbanrisk
Instagram: @banrisk

Lyrics:

I wear a mask with a smile for hours at a time
stare at the ceiling while I hold back whats on my mind
and when they ask me how I'm doin' I say I'm just fine
and when they ask me how I'm doin' I say I'm just

But the fact is, I can never get off of my mattress
and all that they can ask is, why are you so sad kid, why are you so sad kid
that's what the mask is, that's what the point of the mask is

so you can see I'm trying, you won't see me crying, ill just keep on smiling, im good
and it just keeps on piling, its so terrifying, but I keep on smiling, I'm good

I've been caring too much for so long, been comparing myself for so long
I've been wearing a smile for so long its real, so long its real, so long its real

always being judged by a bunch of strange faces
scared to go outside haven't seen the light in ages
but I've been places, so I'm okay-ish, so I'm okay-ish, yeah I'm okay b----

But the fact is, I need help I'm failing all my classes
They think that I need glasses, I just really wish that I could pass this, wish that I could pass this
that's what the mask is, that's what the point of the mask is

so you can see I'm trying, you won't see me crying, ill just keep on smiling, im good
and it just keeps on piling, its so terrifying, but I keep on smiling, I'm good

I've been caring too much for so long, been comparing myself for so long
I've been wearing a smile for so long its real, so long its real, so long its real

This is a lyrics video for the Dream song "Mask". #Dream #Mask

snippet.title: мҡ°кё° (YUQI) - 'Bonnie & Clyde' Official Music Video
snippet.description:

Composed, Lyrics by Galeyn Tenhaeff, Catalina Schweighauser, Joel StrГ¶mgren, Benjamin Roustaing

Presented by CUBE Entertainment
Performed by YUQI

Creative Director: Mamesjao
Director: Neo Young
Executive Producer: William Mok
Creative Agency: Rec.94
Production Company: Club Media

You pick me up when I feel down
No matter how deep in the night
I got your back when we go out
You know IвҖҷm always on your side

You make this world a little wild
And we shout through crowded streets
Turn up the noise and make it loud
And let the world fall at our feet

We love it on the other side
Where the dreams are real, do what we like
Let them point and laugh, at who we are
It was you and me here dancing from the start

We donвҖҷt need money to feel good
Cause youвҖҷre the ride or die the rest of my life
DonвҖҷt need a party to feel high
WeвҖҷre like the modern version of Bonnie & Clyde

You see the truth YouвҖҷre in my heart
And you catch me every time
And if youвҖҷre low and fall apart
IвҖҷll bring some peace back in your mind

We love it on the other side
Where the dreams are real, do what we like
Let them point and laugh, at who we are
It was you and me here dancing from the start

We donвҖҷt need money to feel good
Cause youвҖҷre the ride or die the rest of my life
DonвҖҷt need a party to feel high
WeвҖҷre like the modern version of Bonnie & Clyde

We donвҖҷt need money to feel good
Cause youвҖҷre the ride or die the rest of my life
DonвҖҷt need a party to feel high
WeвҖҷre like the modern version of Bonnie & Clyde

Give me a three, two, one IвҖҷll be dancing with you
Keep it going on like every day
And in a three two one IвҖҷll shoot you straight to the moon
Through the sky, to the stars in your eyes

TheyвҖҷve all tried to bring us down but
We keep moving up
They wanna steal our golden crown but
All the roads will lead вҖҳem back to us

We donвҖҷt need money to feel good
Cause youвҖҷre the ride or die the rest of my life
DonвҖҷt need a party to feel high
WeвҖҷre like the modern version of Bonnie & Clyde

We donвҖҷt need money to feel good
Cause youвҖҷre the ride or die the rest of my life
DonвҖҷt need a party to feel high
WeвҖҷre like the modern version of Bonnie & Clyde

snippet.description:
рҹ’« Abonne-toi et active les notifications en cliquant sur la рҹ”” juste au-dessus pour voir toutes mes vidГ©os ! N'oublie pas de liker la vidГ©o et de t'abonner juste ici :  https://bit.ly/2yJMrzT


Depuis plusieurs annГ©es, un de mes plus grands rГӘves, c'est de partir au Japon рҹҮҜрҹҮө  Et bien sГ»r, c'est humain, j'ai des idГ©es reГ§ues par rapport Г  ce pays, parfois influencГ©es par mon amour pour cette destination. Et qui de mieux que @Louis-San (qui est franco-japonais), pour me dire si elles sont vraies, ou si au contraire, le Japon n'est pas du tout le pays de rГӘve que j'imaginais ? рҹҳ°

BientГҙt Vegan & Remise Г  ZГ©ro :
https://youtu.be/xLX_OALeC1M

_____________


Dans cette vidГ©o, je ne suis pas seule, puisque je suis accompagnГ©e de Louis San, que vous connaissez peut-ГӘtre grГўce Г  la chaГ®ne Tev et Louis, sur laquelle il fait des vidГ©os avec Tev Ici Japon. Si vous ne le saviez pas, le japon et moi, c'est une grande histoire d'amour qui n'attend que de se concrГ©tiser. J'ai toujours Г©tГ© hyper intriguГ©e et attirГ©e par ce pays, que je veux absolument visiter un jour ! Aujourd'hui, on ne va pas parler de jardin japonais, de jeux japonais ou de gateau japonais, mais des clichГ©s qu'on peut avoir sur ce pays. Mieux qu'un reportage japon, japon documentaire, ou histoire japon, c'est Louis, qui est franco-japonais, qui pourra me dire s'ils sont vrais ou non ! Quand ce sera le cas, je vous ferai forcГ©ment un vlog voyage, enfin sГ»rement ;) Je n'ai pas encore prГ©vu d'apprendre le japonais via des cours de japonais, mais aprГЁs cette vidГ©o, j'avoue que je pourrais vite me laisser tenter

snippet.title: DONNE MOI DE L'AMOUR
snippet.description:
Je me suis levГ©e un matin avec lвҖҷenvie de donner de lвҖҷamour. 
En cette pГ©riode si particuliГЁre, on a tous besoin de rГ©confort.
Alors mвҖҷest venue lвҖҷidГ©e de te faire un compliment, Г  toi et Г  toi aussi. JвҖҷavais envie de te dire Г  quвҖҷelle point tu Г©tais une belle personne et la chaГ®ne de compliments est nГ©e. 
AmГ©lie a parlГ© avec son coeur Г  Samy qui a parlГ© Г  LaurГЁne qui a complimentГ©
Camille qui a souri Г  Guilaine qui a rencontrГ© Guillaume qui a faire rire Marie-ChloГ© qui a rГ©confortГ© Bianca qui a fait plaisir Г  Justine.

snippet.title: BUGATTI Chiron Sport 'Les LГ©gendes du Ciel' meets Dassault Rafale Marine jet вҖ“ 7,227 PS let loose
snippet.description:
Two French Legends of the Sky вҖ“ the BUGATTI Chiron Sport вҖҳLes LeМҒgendes du CielвҖҷ and the Dassault Rafale Marine вҖ“ come together to celebrate French pioneering and passion for over a century. It were the French who were the driving forces in motor sports racing as well as flying at the beginning of the 20th century. And some of the greatest French pilots of that time also became legends on the Grand Prix courses in their Bugattis.  

When BUGATTI honored them with the special edition CHIRON Sport вҖҳLes LeМҒgendes du CielвҖҷ, it was self-evident for French navy pilot Etienne Bauer to revive this unique connection and set up an ultimate high-octane rendezvous between FranceвҖҷs two  masterpieces of engineering to unleash their power: 1,500 PS versus 58,550 newtons of thrust (5,727 PS).

#BUGATTI #CHIRONSport #LegendesDuCiel #DassaultAviation #Rafale #RafaleMarine

WLTP: Fuel consumption, l/100km: low 43.33 / medium 22.15 / high 17.99 / extra high 18.28 / combined 22.32; CO2 emissions, combined, g / km: 505.61; efficiency class: G

snippet.title: POWERWOLF - Beast Of GГ©vaudan (Official Video) | Napalm Records
snippet.description:
Pre-order "Call Of The Wild" now: https://powerwolf.napalmrecords.com

Matthew Greywolf on the new single:
"We are more than proud to present "Beast of GГ©vaudan", the first song off our upcoming album, Call Of The Wild. The story behind the song couldn't fit better into the world of POWERWOLF: It's about a mysterious beast that killed countless people in the south of France at the end of the 18th century. The beast was never caught and there have always been many legends surrounding the events, up to the interpretation of the clergy, who saw the beast as вҖҳGod's punishmentвҖҷ or even as a вҖҳsavior of mankind from the worldly and sinful existence.вҖҷвҖқ

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3pt FG with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 points (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 rebounds in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

snippet.title: QUI peut ARRГҠTER le FLГүAU ?
snippet.description:

Il est en effet bien connu des fans de marvel pour ГӘtre unstoppable, et il y a une phrase iconique qui le caractГ©rise si bien cвҖҷest вҖңrien nвҖҷarrГӘte le flГ©auвҖқ.

Et comme vous le savez, jвҖҷadore rГ©pondre aux questions et aujourdвҖҷhui nous allons voir qui peut arrГӘter le flГ©au ! Et je pense que vous allez apprendre pas mal de choses sur le personnage !

snippet.title: ON DГүCOUVRE DES CORГүENS QUI CHANTENT FRANГҮAIS (vous allez tomber amoureux)
snippet.description:
Si toi aussi tu as un accent un peu nul nвҖҷhГ©sites pas Г  tГ©lГ©charger Rosetta Stone : https://www.rosettastone.fr/maylinelou-i/

Alors lГ , quel bonheur de vous retrouver aujourdвҖҷhui avec une nouvelle vidГ©o dГ©couverte/rГ©action sur des corГ©ens qui chantent en franГ§ais ! Cette vidГ©o cвҖҷest une vidГ©o un peu bonus, grГўce Г  une abonnГ© Mathilde qui nous a donnГ© lвҖҷidГ©e on a voulu tourner cette vidГ©o au plus vite. Mais cвҖҷГ©tait la MEILLEURE IDГүE AU MONDE, quel honneur de voir des corГ©ens chanter en franГ§ais et en plus HYPER BIEN !? Vous lвҖҷaurez peut-ГӘtre dГ©jГ  vu on a clairement eu une prГ©fГ©rence pour KO EUN SEONG (кі мқҖм„ұ) dвҖҷailleurs je vous invite Г  lвҖҷidentifier sur son passage de vidГ©o sur son IG  : https://www.instagram.com/musical.ko/?hl=ko

La vidГ©o est malheureusement bloquГ© en CorГ©e du Sud il ne pourra donc pas voir la vidГ©o mais si vous lвҖҷidentifiez dans son passage il pourra le voir Г  travers vos stories insta !

Voici les vidГ©os quвҖҷon a regardГ© (elles nвҖҷapparaissent pas toutes dans notre vidГ©o) si vous voulez bien entendre leurs voix sans nos rГ©actions : 

MIKA : https://youtu.be/RRMeJb8FGm0
KO EUN SEONG (reprise GIMS / STING) : https://youtu.be/RdcskkUNEgw
Je te le donne : https://youtu.be/0yoMDbpG8uE
Temps des cathГ©drales : https://youtu.be/mWViVBBB_Kw
LвҖҷenvie dвҖҷaimer KO EUN SEONG (bloquГ© pour notre vidГ©o) : https://youtu.be/XtASVfayE44
Stella OST RATATOUILLE : https://youtu.be/beamS4GZ5T8


Merci Mathilde pour cette idГ©e et ce partage, cвҖҷГ©tait incroyable :)

SUIVRE JULIETTE JAHM SUR SA CHAINE : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0kITZsuxr2DvkzcVYg7lAA

VIENS NOUS SUIVRE SUR NOS RГүSEAUX C'EST COOL  :

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/maylinelou/?hl=fr
Twitter : https://twitter.com/maylinelou
Tiktok : @mayline.lou

contact pro uniquement : mayline.lou@gmail.com

Nous en quelques mots : 

Mayline, 27 ans aime LES PLANTES 

Lou, 23 ans aime les frites, la danse et rire (GOT7 aussi). 

On a vГ©cu a Seoul en 2018 pendant 1 an grГўce au PVT (si tu ne sais pas ce que c'est je t'invite Г  voir nos vidГ©os Г  ce sujet). 

VOILГҖ MAINTENANT TU SAIS TOUT

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Saturday (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
